data.name: Carnal Instinct
data.detailed_description:
Carnal Instinct is an Open World Adult Action RPG with an emphasis on AAA quality visuals and compelling erotic interaction. You enter the world of Sabu a slave, but will forge your own destiny and shape the world itself in this realm of ancient gods, mythical creatures, and boundless lust.

Experience the world of Sabu through fully voice acted quests and erotic interactions with Human, Anthro, Exotic, and Hybrid NPCs as a fully customisable player. Erotic Interactions are available as, and with, Female, Futanari and Male NPCs.

For full details of the most recent update please check the news section.

Your journey begins in a realm of ancient myth, where the life-giving waters of the Euphoris river meet the sand-swept ruins of Sabu. The God-Queen Kethra has not been seen for a thousand years, but rumours of her return are uttered in hushed tones throughout the sprawling villages along the shoreline of the once mighty waterway. Deprived of its divine empress, Sabu has fallen under the rule of demigods, powerful beings that once served Kethra as bodyguards. Unchecked, these immortals now vie for power as warlords, their conquest bathing Sabu with the blood of the innocent.

You enter this world as a slave, a prisoner of fate and the cruelty of others, but you will find that your future is as changeable as the sands of Sabu. The path of fate is yours to tread and your story is not yet written...

The game currently features numerous playable races (Human, Feline, Jackal, Crocodilian, and Draconic) races on the first steps of their ascent to godhood; living echoes of the deities themselves.

As your power increases and development of the project continues, so too will you be able to shape your body. From one which retains the majority of your once-human form, to reflections of the ancient deities that ruled Sabu in centuries past, finally adopting the truly primal presence of those forgotten gods (Centaur, Naga, Sphynx, and more).

Male, Female, and Futa options are all available in-game.

[IMPORTANT NOTE: The GIFs below are from the archived UE4 build and show the lower visual quality of that version of the game]

Customisation extends beyond skins and species, with all manner of sliders allowing customisation of many facets of your character's form...

Our erotic content ranges from "vanilla" love-making to the most exotic carnal desires. Our adult features are more than mere titillation or something to while away the hours, sex links directly into the world and vice versa. As you begin to bend Sabu to your will so you will draw attention from those who wish to submit to your lust, or tame you to indulge their own.

Carnal Instinct contains adult content for Anthro, Human, and Mythical Races - catering to a wide range of preferences and desires. You can enable and disable sexual content to meet your taste, nothing is mandatory and you can choose who you decide to be intimate with and on what terms.

The form into which you shape your body will sometimes dictate what options are open to you, with the more exotic forms allowing more niche sexual opportunities...

The Steam version of the game is the most stable, and gets consistent updates, including huge content updates multiple times throughout the year (precise release timings will vary depending on update complexity).

Unsure how to get the archived UE4 content? Opt-in to the beta branch and download the older version of the game.

data.short_description: Carnal Instinct is an Adult RPG with an emphasis on AAA quality visuals and compelling erotic interaction. You enter the world of Sabu a slave, but will forge your own destiny and shape the world itself in this realm of ancient gods, mythical creatures, and boundless lust.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64-bit Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-6600 (3.3Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 1400 (3.2Ghz)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 4GB or AMD Radeon RX 470 4GB
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 64-bit Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-8700 (3.2Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 3600 (3.6 Ghz)
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce 1080 Ti or AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT or INTEL Arc A770
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 64-bit Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-6600 (3.3Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 1400 (3.2Ghz)
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 4GB or AMD Radeon RX 470 4GB
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: 64-bit Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel Core i7-8700 (3.2Ghz) or AMD Ryzen 5 3600 (3.6 Ghz)
  • Memory: 16 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce 1080 Ti or AMD Radeon RX 5700 XT or INTEL Arc A770
  • DirectX: Version 12
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
